---
title: "Yameng Fan"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:fanym96@connect.hku.hk
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yameng-fan
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      href: CV.pdf
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a Ph.D. Candidate in Economics at the University of Hong Kong.

My research interests include macro development, urban economics, and the Chinese economy.

I am on the academic job market.

## Research

### Job Market Paper

**A Market Solution under Food Security Constraints: Evidence from a Policy Experiment in China**

Abstract: Briefly describe your job market paper here. You can replace this paragraph later with your actual abstract.

### Working Papers

**Paper title 1**  
Brief description.

**Paper title 2**  
Brief description.

## Teaching

Briefly list your teaching experience here.

## Contact

Email: [fanym96@connect.hku.hk](mailto:fanym96@connect.hku.hk)

:::
